mnemonics: SPARK Speeds Processing And Real-time Knowledge
keyPoints: Hadoop is the foundation for distributed storage and processing
Apache Spark provides faster in-memory processing than MapReduce
Apache Pig uses a high-level scripting language (Pig Latin) for data flow
commonMistakes: Assuming Spark replaces Hadoop (they are complementary)
Using MapReduce for real-time processing instead of Spark
Confusing Hive (for SQL-like queries) with Pig (for data flow scripting)
